goal: Build and expose a DeepSeek JSON-output request probe that carries response_format=json_object and deterministic extraction instructions.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek json-check --input '{"ok":true}' --schema summary --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: JSON output parsing and retry policy can pass while the harness never builds or exposes a DeepSeek request shape containing response_format=json_object.
